zh-cn.relationship_trust_tooltip:
成功的[%%tag_job%%]类指令会增加指令参与者互相的信赖
成功的每日管理能增加阵营成员对阵营领导者的信赖
作为阵营成员完成工作指令也能增加阵营管理者对成员的信赖
工作成果糟糕的话不会增加任何信赖

%%relationship_usedtocalculate_obedience%%
自尊低下时信赖提供的数值减半
zh-cn.relationship_fear_tooltip:
当角色的服从度高于2（%%relationship_obedience_3_High%%/%%relationship_obedience_3_Low%%/%%relationship_obedience_3_Fear%%）时，受到疼痛会增加等量的恐惧

%%relationship_usedtocalculate_obedience%%
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
角色不处于紧张或心情糟糕时，恐惧不会提供任何数值。角色心情糟糕且紧张的话，恐惧数值会更高
zh-cn.relationship_goodwill_tooltip:
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
角色心情好时好感数值取更高，反之取更低
角色紧张时好感数值取更高（但放松时不会取低）
当角色的当前恐惧超过当前好感时，好感数值取0
zh-cn.relationship_badwill_tooltip:
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
角色心情差时厌恶数值取更高，反之取更低
角色紧张时厌恶数值取更高（但放松时不会取低）
当角色的当前恐惧超过当前厌恶时，厌恶数值取0
zh-cn.relationship_trust_cap_tooltip: 信任的上限值。增进与角色的关系可以提高该上限。
zh-cn.relationship_desire_tooltip:
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
角色当前的%%chara_status_lust%%越高，该数值也取高，反之取低
角色会将所有作为%%relationship_desire%%对象的角色关系按数值排位，对该角色的%%relationship_desire%%最终数值取 [数值除以排名]
zh-cn.relationship_usedtocalculate_obedience: 该数值主要被用来计算角色的当前服从度
zh-cn.relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude: 该数值主要被用来计算角色的当前态度
zh-cn.personality_selfesteem_tooltip:
低自尊会提高角色的服从度，降低角色的%%relationship_trust%%程度
工作能提升自尊，特定指令会降低自尊，经历心创体验也会降低自尊
zh-cn.stats_base_Strength_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

A mix of traditional Strength and Dexterity.
Represent how a character act on his environment.
Determine carry weight, and Str-based skills (starting level and max level).
zh-cn.stats_base_Constitution_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Traditional Constitution.
Represent how a character respond to environment.
Determine HP value, and CON-based skills (starting level and max level).
zh-cn.stats_base_Psyche_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Represent traditional Intelligence.
Represent how one feels about his environment.
Determine MP value and PSY-based skills (starting level and max level).
zh-cn.stats_base_Willpower_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Represent traditional Wisdom.
Represent how one express himself.
Determine Stress cap, and WIL-based skills.
zh-cn.stats_derived_extended_hp_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Health Point.
If this reaches 0, character will become unconscious
If it reaches negative Constitution score, character dies.
Temporary injury will decrese score, permanent injury will decrease maximum.
Maximum score is 10 + CON Modifier + others.
Naturally recovers during sleep.
zh-cn.stats_derived_extended_mp_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Mana Point, required for casting spells.
Maximum score is 0 + PSY Modifier + others.
Naturally recovers during sleep or rest.
zh-cn.stats_derived_extended_energy_tooltip:
执行需要社交、脑力、和集中的工作时消耗
上限为%%stats_base_Willpower%%*10+其他补正
能通过睡眠或休息回复
当精力过低时角色心情会降低，%%notimplemented%%
zh-cn.stats_derived_extended_stamina_tooltip:
执行体力劳动时消耗
上限为%%stats_base_Constitution%%*10+其他补正
能通过睡眠或休息回复
当角色体力过低时会陷入疲劳状态，%%notimplemented%%
zh-cn.statsEX_capModded: 该属性的上限和下限不会超过最高和最低的单项数值调整
zh-cn.stats_derived_sleepNeed_tooltip:
角色每日需要的睡眠时间（小时单位）
对该数值的修正只会在角色开始睡觉时取用
zh-cn.stats_derived_sleepDepth_tooltip:
角色的睡眠深度，决定角色的睡眠有多容易被打断
该数值不会低于1.0
对该数值的修正只会在角色开始睡觉时取用
zh-cn.stats_derived_memoryEntryCount_tooltip: 该数值决定了角色的心情会受到多少项记忆条目影响（从新到旧）
zh-cn.stats_derived_memoryLength_tooltip: 该数值决定了角色的每项（非永久的）记忆条目会在记忆中保留多久（分钟单位）
zh-cn.event_onNightAssaultFailed_jobD: $color_error_begin$由于$chara$拒绝了全部指令，互动被解除了$color_error_end$

en-us.relationship_trust_tooltip:
Successful [%%tag_job%%] commands will increase mutual trust between participants.
Successful daily management can increase the trust of faction members in their faction leader.
Completing work commands as a faction member can also increase the faction manager's trust in the member.
Poor work results will not increase any trust.

%%relationship_usedtocalculate_obedience%%
%%relationship_trust%% provides half the bonus when %%personality_selfesteem%% is low.
en-us.relationship_fear_tooltip:
When a character's obedience is higher than 2(%%relationship_obedience_3_High%%/%%relationship_obedience_3_Low%%/%%relationship_obedience_3_Fear%%), receiving pain will increase fear by the same amount.

%%relationship_usedtocalculate_obedience%%
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
%%relationship_fear%% provides no bonus unless the character is stressed or in a bad mood. If the character is both in a bad mood and stressed, %%relationship_fear%% value will be evaluated higher.
en-us.relationship_goodwill_tooltip:
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
Goodwill values are evaluated higher when the character is in a good mood, and lower when they are in a bad mood.
Goodwill values will be higher when the character is stressed (but will not be lower when relaxed).
When the character's current fear exceeds their current goodwill, goodwill will cease to provide any bonus.
en-us.relationship_badwill_tooltip:
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
Aversion values are higher when the character is in a bad mood, and lower when they are in a good mood.
Aversion values are higher when the character is stressed (but will not be lower when relaxed).
When the character's current fear exceeds their current aversion, aversion will not provide any bonus or malus.
en-us.relationship_desire_tooltip:
%%relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude%%
The higher the character's current %%chara_status_lust%%, the higher this value; conversely, the lower it is, the lower this value.
Chara will rank all its %%relationship_desire%% targets in decreasing order, and evaluate %%relationship_desire%% toward a character by their [%%relationship_desire%% divided by ranking]
en-us.relationship_usedtocalculate_obedience: used to calculate the character's current obedience.
en-us.relationship_usedtocalculate_attitude: used to calculate the character's current attitude.
en-us.personality_selfesteem_tooltip:
Low %%personality_selfesteem%% will increase character's %%relationship_obedience%% and lowers %%relationship_trust%%
Work can increase %%personality_selfesteem%%, and some commands can lower it. Traumatic experience will also lowers %%personality_selfesteem%%
en-us.stats_base_Strength_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

A mix of traditional Strength and Dexterity.
Represent how a character act on his environment.
Determine carry weight, and Str-based skills (starting level and max level).
en-us.stats_base_Constitution_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Traditional Constitution.
Represent how a character respond to environment.
Determine HP value, and CON-based skills (starting level and max level).
en-us.stats_base_Psyche_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Represent traditional Intelligence.
Represent how one feels about his environment.
Determine MP value and PSY-based skills (starting level and max level).
en-us.stats_base_Willpower_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Represent traditional Wisdom.
Represent how one express himself.
Determine Stress cap, and WIL-based skills.
en-us.stats_derived_extended_hp_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Health Point.
If this reaches 0, character will become unconscious
If it reaches negative Constitution score, character dies.
Temporary injury will decrese score, permanent injury will decrease maximum.
Maximum score is 10 + CON Modifier + others.
Naturally recovers during sleep.
en-us.stats_derived_extended_mp_tooltip:
%%notimplemented%%

Mana Point, required for casting spells.
Maximum score is 0 + PSY Modifier + others.
Naturally recovers during sleep or rest.
en-us.stats_derived_extended_energy_tooltip:
Consumed when performing tasks requiring social interaction, mental effort, and concentration.
Capped at %%stats_base_Willpower%% * 10 + other modifiers
Can be restored through sleep or rest.
When a character's energy is too low, their mood will decrease. %%notimplemented%%
en-us.stats_derived_extended_stamina_tooltip:
Consumed when performing physical labor.
Capped at %%stats_base_Constitution%% * 10 + other modifiers
Can be restored through sleep or rest.
When a character's stamina is too low, they will become fatigued. %%notimplemented%%
en-us.statsEX_capModded: This stat's final value will not go above or below any of its single maximum or minimum score value adjustments.
en-us.stats_derived_sleepNeed_tooltip:
The amount of sleep hours a character needs daily.
Any modifications to this value will only take effect when the character starts sleeping.
en-us.stats_derived_sleepDepth_tooltip:
The character's sleep depth, which determines how easily the character's sleep can be interrupted.
This value cannot go lower than 1.0.
Any modifications to this value will take effect when the character starts sleeping.
en-us.stats_derived_memoryEntryCount_tooltip: This value determines how many memory entries (from newest to oldest) will affect the character's mood.
en-us.stats_derived_memoryLength_tooltip: This value determines how long each (non-permanent) memory entry will remain in memory (in minutes).
